description: A piping engineer needs to update the SolveSpace file /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/flange_start.slvs, which contains a 2D cross-section profile for a pipe support T-flange. The drawing was flagged by QA because all five dimensional constraints are wrong. Update all five distance constraints in the file according to the specification sheet on the Desktop. Save the corrected file as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/flange_corrected.slvs and export the sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/flange_corrected.dxf.
